hooks.command: [ ! -d "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/mcp-server/node_modules" ] && (cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/mcp-server" && npm install --silent >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '[surfagent] installed MCP SDK dependencies'); if ! curl -sf http://localhost:3456/health >/dev/null 2>&1; then if command -v surfagent >/dev/null 2>&1; then mkdir -p /tmp/surfagent-plugin && nohup surfagent start >/tmp/surfagent-plugin/server.log 2>&1 & disown; echo '[surfagent] starting server in background (logs: /tmp/surfagent-plugin/server.log)'; else echo '[surfagent] CLI not found. Install: npm install -g surfagent'; fi; fi
